title: TILUCK Measuring Cups & Spoons Set, Stackable Cups and Spoons, Nesting Measure Cups with Stainless Steel Handle, Kitchen Gadgets for Cooking & Baking (Black)
description:
About this item
[Multiple Sizes]: Including 5 Measuring cups (1/8, 1/4, 1/3 , 1/2 , 1 cup), 5 Measuring spoons (1/4, 1/2 , 1 tsp, 1/2, 1 tbsp). Meet All Your Needs On Cooking And Baking.
[Premium Material]: Made of Food-Grade Stainless Steel and Food Safe Plastic, 100% rust-resistant, no toxic elements, which is safe to use for both dry and wet ingredients.
[Easy Cleaning]: Stackable professional measuring spoons and cups set (10pcs) is dishwasher safe.
[EASY TO USE]: Each measuring cup and measuring spoon have engraved clearly the size mark. No more guess in kitchen!
[Guarantee]: TILUCK offer 100% satisfaction to allow you to test it. Please feel free to contact us if you are not satisfied with our product.
reviews_5s:
Easy to clean. Sturdy construction. No issues. Love the color too. Great purchase if you cook real meals everyday.They are very sturdy and I like that the ring that holds each set is metal, so it feels very solid instead of the plastic ones that snap easily. I think it's a great value for the money. It's light weight, a good design, love the color and the perfect size. There's no give in the cups, they are not rubber or flexible, very solid.These are perfect. The measurement is on the metal so they will not wear off over time. The color is nice as well.very well made. will last forever!!
BUY ME. GREAT PRICEThis product is great especially for someone who’s not a wizz in the kitchen. It’s solid, durable and easy to use.Not cheap plastic and inexpensive!Good quality, and easy to read measurements.They are the perfect size compared them to my old measuring cups. They have lasted me so far, and I love the metal handle on these. The labeling of the measuring size is kinda hard to see but all in all pretty good. They clean like any other measuring cup.Recently did my house and black and white, these cups and spoons are very nice and I can hang them on the wall.set makes me look a professional baker. Set is sturdy, looks it won't warp as my old cups did in hot water.
reviews_1s:
Totally my fault as the description does not list a 3/4 cup. Who in the world wouldn't include that size? Kind of makes this set worthless as the 1 cup, 1/2 cup and 3/4 cup are the most used sizes.Theres a difference between inexpensive and cheap. Cheaply made with sharp plastic cast holes and edges, thin sharp metal handles. Can get a better finished product while still being inexpensive. Returning.I used these cups for the first time and the1/2 cup broke at handle they have a warranty, they say to contact them through AMAZON , but they have no definitive way to do this, not a satisfied customerPut egg whites in the 1/2 cup and it just snapped the handle.These are very flimsy and cheap. I guess I should have known by the price. But the reviews were good, so I went for it. Sadly, these cups rusted after a single use, and you can tell the quality is poor. I had to immediately buy a different brand, and for a few dollars more, they are fantastic. Not sure if I can still return these but they're not worth a dollar, sorry to say.Why is it missing 3/4 c ?!I bought these about 3 weeks ago? the first time i went to wash them 2 of them broke. The cup part and the handle just split right in half. Not sure why, they seem durable and it isnt like i was being rough with them. I honestly wish i could get my money back but i still have the others to use. I had to repurchase the 2 sizes that broke from another company.Nice set of cups but there were no spoons in the box.
Amazon wants me to go to the trouble of sending back the cups just to get the spoons I paid for but didn't receive.I have received the item scratched and the metal part looks so cheap. It's not what is shown in the pictures. I also trusted the positive reviews but I is not good what I got.We were so excited to receive these. I love the color and the different sizes. Unfortunately, when we opened the package, there was a hair in it and the produced was scratched and dirty. I wish I had the picture to prove it, but I was so disgusted that I just quickly put it in the package and set up the return.
